# Platform

2 capabilities | 8 met / 8 total acceptance criteria

## Capabilities

### [Installation System](./installation-system.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

The install.sh script provides multi-mode installation of genie-team artifacts into Claude Code's .claude/ directory structure with worktree detection, MCP setup, and component-level selective installation.

### [Session State Tracking](./session-state-tracking.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

Three event hooks maintain session state across context compactions without any LLM cost, capturing command invocations, tracking artifact files, and re-injecting context after compaction.
